name_en: Palais Carnolès – Museum of Fine Arts

phrases.cultural_note: The permanent collection is free. The palace was the summer residence of the Princes of Monaco and sits in a citrus garden.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the entrance to the citrus garden?
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée du jardin d'agrumes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lon-TRAY doo zhar-DAN dah-GROOM
phrases.cultural_note: The citrus garden is part of the visit and also works well as a short stop even if you skip the museum.

responses.english: On the side, through the gate.
responses.phonetic: soor luh koh-TAY, par luh por-TYE
responses.local: Sur le côté, par le portail.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the museum specialises in
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la spécialité du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay lah spay-syah-lee-TAY doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Palais Carnolès houses Menton's fine arts museum in an 18th-century summer palace of the Grimaldi princes, surrounded by a citrus garden.

responses.english: Old-master painting and the citrus garden.
responses.phonetic: lah pan-TOOR ahn-SYEN ay luh zhar-DAN dah-GROOM.
responses.local: La peinture ancienne et le jardin d'agrumes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the garden is free to visit

responses.english: Yes, the garden is always freely accessible.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh zhar-DAN ay too-ZHOOR ahn ak-SAY LEEBR.
responses.local: Oui, le jardin est toujours en accès libre.
